/weekly.title: Week 23, 2026 Frontend Dependency Risk Digest
/weekly.description: 23 risky updates, 9 breaking changes, and 0 security-relevant releases from 50 tracked frontend npm packages.

/risk/security.title: Security-Relevant Frontend Package Releases
/risk/security.description: Frontend npm releases with OSV, CVE, or GitHub release-note security signals.

/risk/breaking.title: Breaking Frontend Package Releases
/risk/breaking.description: Major version frontend npm releases that deserve review before updating.

/risk/review.title: Frontend Package Updates To Review
/risk/review.description: Minor version frontend npm releases that are not urgent but should be reviewed before routine updates.
